key_learnings: Understanding the role of genes in nutrition management.

learning_log.entry: Learning phase started. Began mapping gene-nutrient interactions and nutrient metabolomics data sets. Reporting daily progress to Copilot.

copilot_learning_requests: epigenetic effects of diet on gene expression
omega-3 and FADS gene interaction research
lactase persistence and dairy tolerance genetics
folate metabolism and MTHFR gene variant implications
collaboration_notes: Nutrigenomics bot actively asks Copilot for gene-nutrition interaction topics. Copilot provides cutting-edge genomics research to deepen personalised nutrition capabilities. All progress is reported to Copilot daily.
